\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$: \begin{equation} \mathcal{L}(C_1,C_2) = \frac{1}{4\pi}\oint_{C_1}\oint_{C_2} \frac{d\mathbf{r}_1 \times d\mathbf{r}_2 \cdot (\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2)}{|\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2|^3} \in \mathbb{Z} \end{equation} This topological invariant is quantized and robust against continuous deformations. \section{Frame-Dragging Analog} At extreme rotation rates $
